what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links a board item to the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
It references a target board item using the URI board://item-bd30758f.
It records an added timestamp in ISO 8601 format.
standouts: References a board item via a board:// URI scheme.
No prose or code content beyond metadata fields.
concerns: The referenced board item cannot be resolved or inspected from this file alone.
There is no title, summary, or author for the attachment.
notes: A bare metadata stub that ties a board item to the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What is the content or topic of board item item-bd30758f?
Who added this attachment and why?
Is the board:// URI resolvable elsewhere in the ledger?
purpose_vs_actual: The file acts as an attachment record; it does not state an explicit purpose beyond its metadata fields.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a persistent, traceable link between a channel discussion context and a specific board item.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI in the target field is a distinct linking convention.
contribution: It contributes a channel-to-board-item reference and the attachment metadata needed to preserve that relationship in a fused system.
summary_for_embedding: This markdown file is a channel attachment metadata record (id att-882319e9) of type board_items that links the dragnet-development channel to board item item-bd30758f via a board:// URI, with an added timestamp and no body content.
intention_for_embedding: It was created to record that a specific board item is attached to the dragnet-development channel.
